title: Whole stablized olive mill process water, production thereof and uses thereof
abstract: The present invention relates to to processes for producing treated olive mill process water (OMPW). In some exemplary embodiments, the treated OMPW is used in the preparation/production of body care products.
claims: Claims WHAT IS CLAIMED IS: 1. A method for preparing treated olive mill process water (treated OMPW) from Olive mill process water (OMPW), wherein the treated OMPW has increased antioxidant levels by comparison to the OMPW, the method comprising: (i) ramping up temperature of the OMPW from a starting temperature to a target temperature, wherein the target temperature is in a range that is between about 70Â°C and about 138Â°C; (ii) holding the OMPW at the target temperature, for a target time, and (iii) cooling the OMPW rapidly to room temperature, thereby preparing treated OMPW from OMPW, wherein the treated OMPW has increased antioxidant levels by comparison to the OMPW. 2. The method of claim 1, wherein the ramping up is from a starting temperature of ambient temperature (20Â°C), the target temperature is 135Â°C, the target time is 2 seconds, and the cooling is to ambient temperature in 15 minutes or less. 3. The method of claim 1, wherein the ramping up is from a starting temperature of ambient temperature (20Â°C), the target temperature is 100Â°C, the target time is 1 second, and the cooling is to ambient temperature in 15 minutes or less. 4. The method of claim 1, wherein the ramping up is from a starting temperature of ambient temperature (20Â°C), the target temperature is 72Â°C, the target time is 15 seconds, and the cooling is to ambient temperature in 15 minutes or less. 5. The method of claim 1, wherein the antioxidant levels of the treated OMPW is increased by at least about 5% by comparison to the untreated OMPW. 6. The method of claim 1, further comprising step (iv) homogenizing the treated OMPW. 7. Treated OMPW made according to the method of claim 1. 8. A personal care product comprising the treated OMPW of claim 7. 9. The personal care product of claim 8, wherein the personal care product is a member selected from the group consisting of: a liquid soap, a bar soap, a skin toner, a lotion, and a cream. 10. The personal care product of claim 9, wherein the personal care product is a member selected from the group consisting of a skin toner and a serum and the personal care product comprises treated OMPW in a concentration that is in a range of between about 3% and about 7%. 11. The personal care product of claim 9, wherein the personal care product is a glycerin bar soap and the glycerin bar soap comprises treated OMPW in a concentration that is in a range of between about 5% and about 15%. 12. A food product comprising the treated OMPW of claim 7. 13. The food product of claim 12, wherein the food product is a member selected from the group consisting of: a beverage and a salad dressing.
